hero.desc:
Builder of small things.
Always curious, always caffeinated.
about.title: 01 // about
about.bio_p1: Developer with a tendency to go deep into rabbit holes. I build things to learn — and I learn by breaking things first.
about.bio_p2: Passionate about Python, web development, and anything that makes a computer do something interesting. From steganography tools to REST APIs, each project is an excuse to explore a new technology.

contact.description: Got a project, a question, or just want to say hi? I don't bite (usually).
